prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-15LBPUTOOL-8036TM Product Type: AUTO_ACCESSORY Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 30 Inch Telescoping Magnetic Pickup Tool for 15lb Magnetic Strength Description: A handy tool to have around the home, garage, office, studio, workshop or stored in a toolbox, the ToolTreaux telescoping magnetic rod opens to a full 30 inches, allowing for quick and efficient retrieval of dropped bolts, metal nuts, screws, jewelry pieces and more that may have otherwise remained unreachable.

An indispensable tool for workshops and homes, the magnetic pickup tool with telescopic rod instantly picks up parts weighing up to 15 pounds; the tool is incredibly convenient for projects or operations that work with small metal parts, improving efficiency and ensuring equipment is not lost on site.

The telescoping magnetic pickup tool is made from durable stainless steel ensuring a long service life that will stand up to lots of wear and tear, while the black cushion grip handle provides comfort and control over the movement of the telescoping magnetic sweeper. And, when not in use, the telescoping magnetic pickup tool easily and quickly collapses in on itself by simply pushing the head and tail towards each other; when fully collapsed, the tool measures 7 inches, is lightweight at just 2.7 ounces, and easy to carry on your person or stow away in a toolbox.

Dimensions: 3.2 x 10.4 x 9.4 inches Search Terms: telescoping pole magnet magnetic pick up tool rod grabber home garage workshop office supplies pickup screws drill bits sweeper gadget pounds strength metals specks gold clips nails hardware extract rubber handle grip specialized artisan Features: - TELESCOPING MAGNETIC PICK UP TOOL: A handy tool to have around the home, garage, office, studio, workshop or stored in a tool box, the ToolTreaux telescoping magnetic rod opens to a full 30 inches, allowing for quick and efficient retrieval of dropped bolts, metal nuts, screws, jewelry pieces and more that may have otherwise remained unreachable - 15LBS MAGNETIC PICK UP STRENGTH: An indispensable tool for workshops and homes, the magnetic pick up tool with telescopic rod instantly picks up parts up to 15 pounds; the tool is incredibly convenient for projects or operations that work with small metal parts, improving efficiency and ensuring equipment is not lost on site - STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION: The telescoping magnetic pickup tool is made from durable stainless steel ensuring a long service life that will stand up to lots of wear and tear; the black cushion grip handle provides comfort and control over the movement of the telescoping magnetic sweeper - COMPACT DESIGN: When not in use, the telescoping magnetic pickup tool easily and quickly collapses in on itself by simply pushing the head and tail towards each other; when fully collapsed, the tool measures 7 inches, is lightweight at just 2.7 ounces and easy to carry on person or stow away in a tool box - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.2 x 10.4 x 9.4 inches; Full Extension Length: 30 inches; Collapsed Length: 7 inches; Handle Length: 4.5 inches; Colors: Black, Red, Silver; Material: Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 30 Inch Telescoping Magnetic Pickup Tool

anthropic.title_differentiation: 15Lb Magnetic Strength, Stainless Steel, Extends To 30In, Collapses To 7In, Cushion Grip Handle

openai.title_differentiation: 15 Lb Pull Strength, Stainless Steel Rod, Collapsible 7 Inch Design, Black Cushion Grip, Retrieves Bolts Screws Jewelry
